clean_story:
Now I will teach you logic.

Logic is like tracking animal prints—see one, know next. If fire burn hand, hand pull back. Always same. If rock heavy and foot under, foot hurt. No magic, just must be. You look at what is, then know what comes—like sun rise after dark. Wrong step? Check prints again.
